- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements: MERN Job Posting Platform with DevOps automation (React frontend, Node.js/Express backend, MongoDB, Docker, CI/CD)

- [x] Scaffold the Project: Created complete MERN stack structure with backend, frontend, Docker setup, and CI/CD pipeline

- [x] Customize the Project: Added complete MERN stack with job posting features, authentication, Docker setup, CI/CD pipeline, and comprehensive documentation

- [x] Install Required Extensions: No extensions required for this project setup

- [x] Compile the Project: Backend and frontend dependencies installed successfully

- [x] Create and Run Task: Docker task created (requires Docker to be running)

- [x] Launch the Project: Project ready to launch (instructions provided in README.md)

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete: README.md and DEVELOPMENT.md created with comprehensive documentation
